title: xiyu's Exchanted book
description: This mod is dedicated to fulfilling players' creative visions by offering personalized enchantment effects that cater to their diverse needs.
body:
# Xi Yu's Enchanted Book

This is a mod dedicated to realizing players' creative imaginations, striving to meet players' needs for personalized enchantment effects.

This mod can only be installed on the server side. The client needs to enable the resource pack separately to display enchantments normally. The resource pack link is: [https://gitee.com/god\_xiyu/capeimage/releases/download/test1/xetp.zip](https://gitee.com/god_xiyu/capeimage/releases/download/test1/xetp.zip)

## New Enchantments

This mod was rewritten after the MC1.21 version. As of version 1.1, the mod already contains 25 enchantments. Many of them are quite distinctive.

*   **Star Guide**: Equipment with this enchantment grants the player 14 seconds of night vision at night, and the projectiles fired will home in on target entities within 32 blocks.
*   **Specter Slayer**: Deals additional attack damage to Wardens (additional damage = 2.5 \* enchantment level).
*   **Unyielding**: When about to take fatal damage and all equipped items have this enchantment, experience is consumed to resist the damage; the higher the level, the less experience is consumed.
*   **Soul Reaping**: Increases attack damage by 1 point per level, and killing creatures can upgrade the enchantment level.
*   **Shield Shockwave**: When the shield blocks damage, there is a chance to launch a Warden's sonic attack at the attacker.
*   **Nature's Breath**: Extends underwater breathing time, and the longer you stay underwater, the faster your health recovery speed.
*   **Repelling Thorns**: When the player is attacked, it causes damage to the attacker and repels the attacker. The repelling distance is the same as the同名 (same-named) enchantment in the original version.
*   **Frost Thorns**: Similar to Repelling Thorns, the attacker will receive the Slowness effect.
*   **Disarm**: When attacking a creature, there is a chance to drop the weapon held by the target (no need to kill).
*   **Swift Wind**: Increases the speed of elytra flight, no longer requiring fireworks as power.

## Unique Enchantments in Old Versions (1.18/1.16)

The 1.18/1.16 versions of the Enchanted Book only have 10 types. The following are the unique enchantments of the old version.

*   **Attack Speed Boost**: This enchantment effect increases the attack speed of weapons.
*   **Sluggish Attack**: This is a negative enchantment effect that slows down the attack speed of weapons.
*   **Armor Curse** (adopted from player: Jin Jin Meng Xin): Negative effect, deducts the player's experience value and deducts armor durability.

## About Updates

The author will adopt players' suggestions and update the content combined with their own thinking.
